_comment: 20 hand-labeled prompts. should_trigger=true cases name expected_pattern_id; should_trigger=false cases probe for false positives by sharing keywords with patterns without matching their actual scenario.

cases.prompt: Create a Power Automate flow that runs every minute to sync data from SharePoint

Explain monad transformers in Haskell
